name: Balsamic Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup white wine or apple juice
12 skinless boneless chicken thighs or 6 breast halves (about 1-1/2 pounds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except chicken in a shallow glass or plastic dish.
2. Add chicken; turn to coat with marinade. Cover and refrigerate at least 2 hours.
3. Place chicken and marinade in a 10-inch nonstick skillet. Heat to boiling.
4. Reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 15 to 20 minutes, or until juices of the chicken run clear. Remove chicken; keep warm.
5. Heat marinade to boiling. Boil about 6 minutes, or until liquid is reduced by half.
6. Pour over chicken.
6 servings
